name: hb_6_10
requirements: As part of your analysis, for the source-receptor pair company 2444 -> station 276 over the period (2025-06-15 to 2025-06-20), compute and store: distance_km, bearing_deg (company->station), station_mean_pm25, station_max_pm25 (float), station_exceedance_hours (PM2.5>75, int), company_total_exhaust (float).

turns.query: Help me analyze how emissions from Shougang Jingtang Steel (company_id: 2444) affect air quality at my residential area near Ligong station (station_id: 276) during 2025-06-15 to 2025-06-20, and recommend personal protection strategies
